title: Benzoates Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). This screening assessment focuses on 9 of 10 substances referred to collectively as the Benzoates Group.
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Proposed conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Benzoic acid, methyl ester
None planned at this time
Benzoic acid, ethyl ester
Benzoic acid, isobutyl ester
Diethylene glycol dibenzoate
Ethanol, 2,2'-oxybis-, dibenzoate
Benzoic acid, butyl ester
1,2,3-Propanetriol, tribenzoate
Dipropylene glycol dibenzoate
Propanol, oxybis-, dibenzoate
Trimethylpentanediyl dibenzoate
1,3-Pentanediol, 2,2,4-trimethyl-, dibenzoate
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153, No. 6 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment.  The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 151, No. 52 .
One other substance, 1,3-benzenedicarboxylic acid (CAS RN 121-91-5), was identified as being part of the Benzoates Group at the outset of the third phase of the CMP . This substance was subsequently determined to be of low concern to both human health and the environment, through other approaches. Conclusions for 1,3-benzenedicarboxylic acid are provided in the Screening Assessment for Substances Identified as Being of Low Concern using the Ecological Risk Classification of Organic Substances and the Threshold of Toxicological Concern (TTC)-based Approach for Certain Substances .
